---
title: "Otra prueba .rpackage"
description: "An R package for standardising and cleaning data."
date: 2025-11-12
image: ../files/img/projects/econcleanr-thumb.png
categories: [R, package, open-source]
---

## Overview

`pruebar` provides a tidy interface for cleaning and harmonising
data (labels, missing codes, weights) across
multiple survey rounds.
<!--
## Installation

```r
# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("username/pruebar")
```

## Links

- [{{< fa brands github >}} Source & documentation](https://github.com/username/pruebarr)
- [{{< fa book >}} Package website (pkgdown)](https://username.github.io/econcleanr/)
------------------------------------------------------------------------
